---
title: "Anne Collins"
---

## Anne Collins

**Dates:** (b. 1846/7)

### Description

housemaid

### Biography

Daughter of George and Martha Collins of Otterbourne, she was housemaid to the Rev. George Merriman, headmaster of Royal Grammar School, Guildford, in 1862.  She was probably working for the Moberlys in the Isle of Wight in 1869 when CMY heard via Mr Wither her report that George Moberly had been made Bishop of Salisbury.

### Letters

- Letter from August 12. [1869]
- Letter from May 7th 1862[[footnote:1]]
- Letter from May 28th 1861

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
